name: Figma Client
description: Read Figma files and render frame images via the REST API. Subcommands: check / whoami / get-file / get-nodes / get-file-meta / export-images / list-versions / list-comments / post-comment / figjam-to-mermaid / get-variables / list-dev-resources / raw. Variables and dev resources are best-effort (typically require Enterprise / Dev Mode access). The agent never sees the Personal Access Token.

input.arguments: a subcommand and its arguments (e.g., export-images FILE_KEY --ids 1:2,1:3 --format png --output ./out)

output.layout: JSON to stdout by default; --output writes to a file or directory; export-images writes image bytes to the output dir; figjam-to-mermaid prints a fenced Mermaid block.
